case_title: DATTANI, KAUSHIK vs. LANDSBERG ASSOCIATES,INC.DBA ULTIMATE KITCHEN&BATH et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DATTANI, KAUSHIK AS TO DEFENDANT LANDSBERG ASSOCIATES,INC.DBA ULTIMATE KITCHEN&BATH ROBERTSON, SHARON DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-08-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-10-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-19-1995

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-09-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-09-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 3RD OSC; IF NOT GOOD CAUSE IS SHOWN COURT WILL DISMISS THE CASE OR TAKE OTHER APPROPRIATE ACTION., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-12-1995 CONTINUED FROM AUG-09-1995 TO SEP-12-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-12-1995, OFF CALENDAR

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-08-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUN-08-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT HEARING SET FOR JUL-10-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-10-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-10-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR AUG-09-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
